subcodes.first_line: O pure and attracted leaf! Upon thee be the glory of the All-Glorious and the praise of God, the Most High, the Most Exalted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه زکیه منجذبه علیک بهاء الله الابهی و ثناء الله العلی الاعلی شکر کن
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
